name: vision
_note: film-studios.vision routes to the LLaVA/Qwen-VL vision brain via callVision / callVisionUrl (server/lib/vision-inference.js) — EXTERNAL-IO, not headless-safe, so it is driven for its pure validation path ONLY. With neither imageB64 nor imageUrl supplied it returns { ok:false, error:'imageB64 or imageUrl required' } BEFORE any brain call (the only deterministic, network-free path). Any case that supplies an image would hit the vision brain and is intentionally excluded. Marked external_io:true so the harness does not fuzz it against a live model.
